data.name: Littara

weaponImprint.name: Model ARM
weaponImprint.trait: If AoE damage is dealt, apply 1 debuff for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect: If remaining mobility is greater than 3 tiles when performing an active attack, increase damage dealt by 5%/7%/9%/11%/13%/15%. If the target has a debuff, damage is increased by an additional 5%.

data.effects: An extremely introverted doll who needs to communicate through writing. She is meticulous and thorough, playing a "strategist" role in the team. After switching to a new Imprint Model, she has become even more reliable, supporting her teammates' dreams daily.

skills.name: Quick Writing
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Systematic Breakdown
skills.description: At the end of the action, deals AoE Physical damage equal to 30% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to the nearest target within range under a defense debuff, and gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: At the end of the action, deals AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to the nearest target within range under a defense debuff, and gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel3: At the end of the action, deals AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to 2 nearest targets within range under a defense debuff, and gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Deals damage to 2 nearest enemy targets within range with a defense debuff.

skills.name: Perfect Opportunity
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles to attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 70% of attack to them and all enemy targets within 2 tiles, applying [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles to attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them and all enemy targets within 2 tiles, applying [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] for 2 turns.

skills.name: Reliable Cover
skills.description: Select 1 direction around self, deal AoE Physical damage equal to 65% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x8 area, 2 tiles away in the selected direction and apply [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] for 2 turns. Destroy all destructible Cover within that area. For each target hit, reduce this skill's cooldown by 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 direction around self, deal AoE Physical damage equal to 65% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x8 area in the selected direction and apply [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] for 2 turns. Destroy all destructible Cover within that area, excluding a 3x3 area around self. For each target hit, reduce this skill's cooldown by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The effect range increases to 3x8 tiles in front.

skills.name: Strategist's Plan
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within 8 tiles to launch an attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 85% of attack to all enemy targets within 2 tiles. If the target has a defense debuff, change the damage dealt to AoE Physical damage equal to 95% of attack and 4 points of stability damage.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 tile within 8 tiles to launch an attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 85% of attack to all enemy targets within 2 tiles. If the target has a defense debuff, change the damage dealt to AoE Physical damage equal to 95% of attack and 4 points of stability damage. Additionally, damage dealt to targets with defense debuffs is increased by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 tile within 8 tiles to launch an attack, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 85% of attack to all enemy targets within 2 tiles. If the target has a defense debuff, change the damage dealt to AoE Physical damage equal to 95% of attack and 4 points of stability damage. Additionally, damage dealt to targets with defense debuffs is increased by 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage dealt to targets with defense debuffs is increased by 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Confectance Index consumption is reduced by 2 points.

keys.effect: Damage dealt to targets with defense debuffs is increased by 7%.
If the target has any defense debuffs, damage dealt to it is increased by 10%. In addition, ignore 15% of its cover damage reduction.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle
Gains 1 point of Confectance Index for every 3 instances of damage dealt
When exploiting a phase weakness, randomly applies 1 debuff to the target after attacking for 2 turns.
If the target has defense debuffs, increase critical rate by 15%.
When using the active skill Perfect Opportunity, applies [effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425] to the target for 2 turns.
Before using the active skill Reliable Cover, if no movement has been made, changes the type of damage dealt to AoE Burn damage.

doll.name: Littara
doll.effects: An extremely introverted doll who needs to communicate through writing. She is meticulous and thorough, playing a "strategist" role in the team. After switching to a new Imprint Model, she has become even more reliable, supporting her teammates' dreams daily.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with defense debuffs is increased 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
The damage of attacks which hit 2 or more enemy units is increased by 12%.
